title: CenterPoint Energy appoints new Independent Board Chair
text: Earl M. Cummings named Independent Chair of the Board HOUSTON , Aug. 21, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- CenterPoint Energy, Inc. (NYSE: CNP) announced that the company's Board of Directors has appointed Earl M. Cummings as its Independent Board Chair.

title: CenterPoint Energy, Inc. Announces Pricing of Offering of $900 Million of 4.25% Convertible Senior Notes Due 2026
text: HOUSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--CenterPoint Energy, Inc. (NYSE: CNP) today announced the pricing of its offering of $900 million of 4.25% Convertible Senior Notes due 2026 (the “convertible notes”) in a private placement to persons reasonably believed to be qualified institutional buyers pursuant to Rule 144A under the Securities Act of 1933, as amended (the “Securities Act”). title: CenterPoint Energy, Inc. Announces Offering of $900 Million of Convertible Senior Notes Due 2026
text: HOUSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--CenterPoint Energy, Inc. (NYSE: CNP) today announced the commencement of its offering of $900 million of Convertible Senior Notes due 2026 (the “convertible notes”) in a private placement to persons reasonably believed to be qualified institutional buyers pursuant to Rule 144A under the Securities Act of 1933, as amended (the “Securities Act”).
